steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The phrase comparatively little notice describes below-sea-level research as receiving little attention. Because the sentence begins with though, the high-altitude studies must be the opposite: plentiful or extensive.

steps.title: Rule out mismatches
steps.content: Choice A describes an early stage, not amount. Choice B means irregular and suggests limited attention. Choice C means ambiguous, which concerns clarity rather than quantity. The remaining word means abundant. The answer is D.
